query: Where can I get emergency cardiac care in Jaipur?

recommendation.name: Sawai Man Singh (SMS) Hospital
recommendation.reason: This is a major tertiary care center in Jaipur with verified 24/7 emergency cardiac facilities and multiple cardiologists on staff.

reasoning.text: Searched for 24/7 cardiac emergency care in Jaipur.
Found several clinics claiming 24/7 cardiac care but with very low extraction confidence and missing staff details.
Selected SMS Hospital as the highest-trust, verified alternative nearby.

warnings.name: Heart Care Centre & Pharmacy
warnings.reason: This is registered as a pharmacy but claims advanced cardiac emergency services with 0 doctors listed (Rule: EMERGENCY_UNDERSTAFFED).
